body:
This PR eliminates the cache for the Raleigh sponge.

As we discussed in the meeting today, it seems like doing this generally has several benefits:

 - fewer variables that we need to worry about keeping consistent
 - fewer reads/writes/kernel launches (better performance)

I'm actually not sure that I can think of downsides, at least for this particular example.
title: Eliminate Rayleigh sponge cache

body: This PR eliminates the subsidence cache.
title: Eliminate subsidence cache
